data.title: Correction: Share buybacks in Ericsson during the period April 20 - April 24, 2026
data.description: On April 27, 2026, an update was issued regarding the share buybacks of Ericsson that took place between April 20 and April 24, 2026. The previous announcement incorrectly listed the total "Weighted Average Share Price Per Day (SEK)" in the table as SEK 106.74. The corrected information is now reflected in the updated table.

data.title: Saigon Technology Introduces the 16-Hour Development Cycle, Helping US Companies Double Engineering Output
data.description: In Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, on April 28, 2026, Saigon Technology, a renowned software development and AI engineering firm with more than 14 years in the industry catering to US and APAC corporations, is rolling out a new operational framework. This model will empower US engineering teams to efficiently manage their processes and enhance collaboration with the company.

data.title: Precore Gold Welcomes Tenured Geologist Raúl Carbajal as Senior Project Manager at Its Arikepay Project in Peru
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 28, 2026, Precore Gold Corp. (CSE: PRCG) introduced Raúl Carbajal as the new Senior Project Manager for the Arikepay Project in Southern Peru. This copper-gold flagship project holds significant potential for the Company.

data.title: Clariane has launched a proposed offering of €230 million of additional senior notes to refinance its hybrid green perpetual bonds

Bank of Japan Governor Ueda said policymakers will monitor if the economy undergoes a major correction phase.
Bank of Japan Governor Ueda said the BOJ stayed on hold as the probability of its baseline outlook decreased.
BoJ's Governor Ueda: I can't say how many months it would take to gauge timing of our next rate hike.

data.title: Nordea cancels repurchased shares
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Helsinki, Nordea Bank Abp announced the cancellation of 8,935,424 treasury shares as per the decision made by the Board of Directors. This action has led to a change in the total number of voting rights and capital as of 9:15 EET on the same day.
BoJ's Governor Ueda: No change to our view that we expect underlying inflation to be around 2% from second half of fy 2026.

data.title: Agenda for Essity's Capital Markets Day Accelerating progress by sharpening focus and execution
data.description: A hygiene and health company, Essity, is scheduled to host its Capital Markets Day in Gothenburg, Sweden on May 7, 2026. The event will commence at 09:00 CET and is anticipated to end around 13:00. Participants will gain insights into Essity Group's strategies and future plans during the agenda.
Bank of Japan Governor Ueda noted that underlying inflation has not fully stabilized at the 2% level.

data.title: SINEXCEL Powers Latvia's Largest Wind Farm Energy Storage Project with Advanced 1725kW PCS
data.description: In Tārgale, Latvia, on April 28, 2026, SINEXCEL, a leading power inverter manufacturer ranked Tier 1 by BloombergNEF in 2026, has provided twelve Power Conversion Systems (PCS) each with a capacity of 1725kW for a significant wind farm energy storage initiative in the country. This project includes a 20.64MWh battery energy storage system situated alongside...
SHIN-ETSU WITHHOLDS FY FORECASTS ON MIDDLE EAST SITUATION

data.title: Beyond Simulation: Sungrow Completes World's First Large-Scale Full-Condition Grid-Forming Extreme Test
data.description: In HEFEI, China, as of April 28, 2026, Sungrow, a top provider of PV inverters and energy storage systems worldwide, achieved the world's initial significant grid-forming full-scenario validation. This project encompassed 14 different scenarios over a span of 138 hours and was carried out independently.
According to BOJ Governor Ueda, Japan’s economy has a moderate level of resilience.
Bank of Japan Governor Ueda noted that Middle East uncertainty has reduced the chances of the price and economic outlook playing out as expected.
Bank of Japan Governor Ueda said the BOJ will act appropriately on monetary policy to avoid lagging behind the curve.
According to BOJ Governor Ueda, the BOJ prefers to spend more time evaluating how Middle East conditions may influence Japan’s economy, prices, and goal achievement.

data.title: Valmet to start change negotiations regarding temporary layoffs in Finland
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Valmet Oyj announced that they would be initiating change negotiations in Finland as per the Finnish Co-operation Act starting on May 4, 2026. The plan being discussed during these negotiations may involve temporary layoffs affecting a portion of their workforce. The company is taking these measures to navigate through challenging times and adjust their operations accordingly.
Bank of Japan Governor Ueda said the BOJ will keep increasing interest rates while adjusting the level of monetary support according to economic, price, and financial conditions.
